name: Leading Out Loud Launch
description: Take the podcast from four recorded pilots to a public weekly cadence: finalize episode edits with PodBean Pro, build a guest pipeline, and publish the season-one trailer and first episodes.

name: The Safety Equation Proposal
description: Assemble the book proposal package for Rick Halloran and draft the opening chapters framing psychological safety as a measurable business driver. Manuscript target 2027-03-01.
